        // [Expressive]

        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<global::Foo.C, string>> Expression() 
        {
            var p__this = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::Foo.C), "@this");
